query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime view of a residential courtyard surrounded by multi-story buildings with illuminated windows. A tall street lamp stands prominently in the center foreground, emitting a bright yellow-orange light. Fog fills the air, softening the appearance of the background buildings and additional light sources. In the lower right corner, a curved concrete bench or wall is visible, and a strip of foliage runs along the bottom edge of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime view of a residential courtyard surrounded by multi-story buildings with illuminated windows, suffused with a sickly yellow-orange sodium vapor cast that tinges every surface. A tall street lamp stands prominently in the center foreground, its bright glow bleeding into heavy fog that creates a low-contrast, oppressive atmosphere with crushed midtones. The scene evokes atmospheric distress and isolation, as the background buildings dissolve into an unsettling haze. A curved concrete bench sits in the lower right corner, nearly lost to shadow, while sparse foliage along the bottom edge adds to the melancholic, uneasy mood.
